title: PSV edges AZ Alkmaar as late Ricardo Pepi goal seals 2–1 win
title_zh: 埃因霍温凭借已故的里卡多·佩皮进球以 2-1 击败阿尔克马尔
description: PSV Eindhoven secured a narrow 2-1 victory over AZ Alkmaar on Saturday evening.
description_zh: 周六晚间，埃因霍温PSV队以2-1险胜阿尔克马尔AZ队。

title: Breda man gets 30 months for scamming elderly with fake police calls
title_zh: 布雷达男子因拨打虚假报警电话诈骗老年人被判处30个月监禁
description: A 26-year-old man from Breda wassentenced
description_zh: 一名来自布雷达的26岁男子被判刑

title: Foreign Minister Berendsen calls Russian Paralympic participation “incomprehensible”
title_zh: 外交部长别伦森称俄罗斯参加残奥会“令人费解”。
description: The Dutch government condemned Russia and Belarus for being allowed to compete under their national flags at the 2026 Paralympic Winter Games in Milan and Cortina d’Ampezzo, citing ongoing attacks
description_zh: 荷兰政府谴责允许俄罗斯和白俄罗斯以本国国旗参加2026年米兰和科尔蒂纳丹佩佐冬季残奥会，并指出两国正遭受持续不断的袭击。

title: Two men acquitted in Eindhoven fatal shooting after police fail to identify shooter
title_zh: 埃因霍温致命枪击案两名男子被判无罪，警方未能确认枪手身份
description: A court in Oost-Brabant has
description_zh: 东布拉班特省的一家法院

title: Dutch party membership hits 448,000, highest since 1980s
title_zh: 荷兰政党党员人数达44.8万人，创1980年代以来新高
description: The number of Dutch citizens holding membership in political parties has reached levels not seen since the mid-1980s, according to a report released Friday by the Documentation Centre for Dutch Pol
description_zh: 根据荷兰政治文献中心周五发布的一份报告，荷兰公民加入政党的人数已达到自20世纪80年代中期以来的最高水平。

title: Dutch owl researcher Marjon Savelsberg wins award for owl vocalization studies
title_zh: 荷兰猫头鹰研究员马尔琼·萨维尔斯伯格因其对猫头鹰发声的研究而获奖
description: Marjon Savelsberg, a Maastricht-based owl researcher, will receive the Special Achievement Award on Saturday at the International Festival of Owls in Houston, Minnesota, for her contributions to ow
description_zh: 来自马斯特里赫特的猫头鹰研究员玛琼·萨维尔斯贝格将于周六在明尼苏达州休斯顿举行的国际猫头鹰节上获得特别成就奖，以表彰她对猫头鹰研究的贡献。

title: Dutch repatriation flight from Oman postponed “due to security situation,” ministry says
title_zh: 荷兰外交部称，从阿曼起飞的荷兰撤侨航班因“安全形势”推迟。
description: A Dutch government-chartered repatriation flight from Muscat, Oman, to Amsterdam was postponed Saturday “due to the security situation,” the Ministry of Foreign Affairs announced on Saturday aftern
description_zh: 荷兰外交部周六下午宣布，由于“安全形势”，荷兰政府包机从阿曼首都马斯喀特飞往阿姆斯特丹的遣返航班被推迟。

title: Dutch Beemster cheese wins 2026 World Champion title in Wisconsin
title_zh: 荷兰比姆斯特奶酪在威斯康星州赢得2026年世界冠军头衔
description: Beemster Royaal Grand Cru, a cheese produced by CONO Kaasmakers in Westbeemster, Netherlands, was named the 2026 World Champion Cheese at the World Championship Cheese Contest, the Wisconsin Cheese
description_zh: 由荷兰韦斯特比姆斯特的CONO Kaasmakers公司生产的Beemster Royaal Grand Cru奶酪，在2026年威斯康星奶酪世界锦标赛上荣获世界冠军奶酪称号。

title: Repatriation flight from Oman delayed for safety reasons
title_zh: 由于安全原因，从阿曼起飞的遣返航班延误。
description: A Dutch repatriation flight to bring stranded holidaymakers and others back from the Middle East has been delayed because of...
description_zh: 一架荷兰遣返航班因故延误，该航班旨在接回滞留在中东的度假者和其他人员……

title: Man sentenced to five years for sextortion, sexual abuse of girls aged 9 to 16
title_zh: 男子因性勒索和性侵9至16岁女孩被判处五年监禁
description: A 31-year-old man was sentenced to five years in prison and compulsory psychiatric treatment for sexually abusing multiple girls both online and in person, the Oost-Brabant court
description_zh: 东布拉班特法院判处一名31岁男子五年监禁，并强制接受精神治疗，罪名是线上线下性侵多名女孩。

title: Dutch customs seize 400 kilos of cocaine hidden in bananas from Ecuador
title_zh: 荷兰海关查获藏匿于厄瓜多尔香蕉中的400公斤可卡因
description: Dutch customs authorities seized 400 kilograms of cocaine hidden in a pallet of bananas at the port of Vlissingen on March 6, officials reported.
description_zh: 据官员报道，3月6日，荷兰海关当局在弗利辛根港查获了藏在一托盘香蕉中的400公斤可卡因。

title: Video: Blaze engulfs JPB Logistics in Delfzijl, chemical fire now under control
title_zh: 视频：德尔夫宰尔JPB物流公司发生火灾，化学品火灾现已得到控制
description: A large fire broke out Saturday afternoon at JPB Logistics on Industriepark Farmsum in Delfzijl, prompting emergency services to escalate the response to GRIP-2, a coordination level that allows mu
description_zh: 周六下午，位于德尔夫宰尔法姆苏姆工业园的JPB物流公司发生大火，紧急救援部门随即把响应级别提升至GRIP-2，这是一个允许……的协调级别。

title: Dutch court stops payment service from blocking coffeeshop card transactions
title_zh: 荷兰法院阻止支付服务商屏蔽咖啡店刷卡交易
description: Customers at Dutch coffeeshops can continue paying with debit cards after a court in Utrecht ruled against a payment service provider’s plan to stop handling transactions.
description_zh: 乌得勒支一家法院驳回了支付服务提供商停止处理交易的计划，荷兰咖啡店的顾客可以继续使用借记卡付款。

title: Dense morning fog in northwest, sunny skies in east and south
title_zh: 西北部早晨雾气浓重，东部和南部晴朗无云。
description: Saturday morning brought widespread fog and low clouds to the northwestern Netherlands, while the east and southeast experienced sunshine and milder temperatures, the weather service Weeronline
description_zh: 周六早晨，荷兰西北部大范围出现雾气和低云，而东部和东南部则阳光明媚，气温较为温和，荷兰气象服务网站Weeronline报道。

title: Double Dutch: Femke Kok, Jenning de Boo win world sprint titles
title_zh: 双荷兰：Femke Kok、Jenning de Boo 夺得短距离世界冠军
description: The World speed skating sprint championships in Heerenveen have been the most successful ever for the Dutch squad, with Femke...
description_zh: 在海伦芬举行的世界速度滑冰短距离锦标赛上，荷兰队取得了有史以来最辉煌的成绩，费姆克……

title: Foot found in Beneden-Merwede belongs to missing 16-year-old
title_zh: 在贝内登-梅尔韦德发现的脚属于一名失踪的16岁少年。
description: A foot found in a shoe Monday in a branch of the Beneden-Merwede River has been identified through DNA testing as 16-year-old Yoran Krol, missing since December 2023, police said Friday.
description_zh: 警方周五表示，周一在贝内登-梅尔韦德河支流的一只鞋子里发现的一只脚，经 DNA 检测确认，属于自 2023 年 12 月以来失踪的 16 岁少年约兰·克罗尔。

title: Cabinet’s plan to cut parental leave benefits could reverse gains in gender equality
title_zh: 内阁削减育儿假福利的计划可能会逆转性别平等方面取得的成果。
description: The Dutch government’s plan to reduce parental leave benefits for middle- and high-income earners could lead to more gender inequality, experts warned Saturday.
description_zh: 专家周六警告称，荷兰政府计划削减中高收入人群的育儿假福利，这可能会导致性别不平等加剧。

title: Verstappen crashes in Australian GP qualifying, will start Sunday’s race from the back
title_zh: 维斯塔潘在澳大利亚大奖赛排位赛中撞车，将在周日的正赛中从后排发车。
description: Verstappen lost control of his car about 10 minutes into Q1 in Australian GP qualifying, spinning into the tire barriers and forcing him to start Sunday’s race from the back of the field.
description_zh: 在澳大利亚大奖赛排位赛第一节进行到大约 10 分钟时，维斯塔潘失去了对赛车的控制，撞上了轮胎墙，迫使他从周日比赛的最后一位发车。

title: Hay fever complaints surge amid early pollen season, sending many to the doctor
title_zh: 花粉季提前到来，花粉症病例激增，导致许多人就医。
description: Research institute Nivel reports that GP visits for hay fever spiked last week. Around 142 out of every 100,000 people consulted a doctor for symptoms, up from 62 per 100,000 the previous week.
description_zh: Nivel研究机构报告称，上周因花粉症就诊的人数激增。每10万人中约有142人因出现相关症状而咨询医生，高于前一周的每10万人62人。

title: Finance Min. surprised coalition, officials with plans to change new Box 3 tax: Report
title_zh: 据报道，财政部长计划修改新的第三类税，令执政联盟和官员们感到意外。
description: Finance Minister Eelco Heinen (VVD) surprised the coalition parties and his own civil servants when he suddenly announced last month that the long-debated bill for the new Box 3 tax syste
description_zh: 财政部长埃尔科·海宁（VVD）上个月突然宣布，经过长期讨论的新第三类税制法案将被搁置，这令执政联盟各党派和其公务员都感到意外。

title: Europol warns Middle East conflict escalation raises terrorism risk in EU
title_zh: 欧洲刑警组织警告称，中东冲突升级加剧欧盟恐怖主义风险
description: Europol has told the Spanish news agency EFE that rising tensions in the Middle East are affecting security in the European Union, with heightened risks of terrorism, organized crime, extremism, an
description_zh: 欧洲刑警组织告诉西班牙埃菲通讯社，中东地区日益紧张的局势正在影响欧盟的安全，恐怖主义、有组织犯罪、极端主义等风险加剧。

title: Dutch emergency services to get fifth trauma helicopter to improve response times
title_zh: 荷兰紧急救援部门将引进第五架创伤直升机，以缩短响应时间
description: A majority in the Tweede Kamer, the lower house of Dutch parliament, backs plans to station an extra trauma helicopter at Teuge Airport in Gelderland, according to VVD and BBB after reports by RTL
description_zh: 据荷兰自由民主党（VVD）和荷兰商业党（BBB）援引RTL电视台的报道，荷兰议会下院（Tweede Kamer）多数议员支持在海尔德兰省特赫机场增设一架创伤救护直升机的计划。

title: Dutch ministry probes possible conflict of interest in Muslim youth discrimination study
title_zh: 荷兰政府部门调查穆斯林青年歧视研究中可能存在的利益冲突
description: The Dutch Ministry of Social Affairs and Employment is investigating a potential conflict of interest in a recent study on discrimination against Muslim youth, after it emerged that the study’s fun
description_zh: 荷兰社会事务和就业部正在调查一项近期关于穆斯林青年歧视的研究是否存在潜在的利益冲突，此前有消息称该研究存在趣味性问题。

title: Tech giants struggle to answer Dutch MPs on harmful content and influence
title_zh: 科技巨头难以回应荷兰议员关于有害内容和影响力的质询。
description: Social media companies TikTok, Meta, and Google were unable to allay the concerns of Dutch MPs during a discussion on transparency, potential influence, and the measures the platforms are taking to
description_zh: 在一次关于透明度、潜在影响力以及平台正在采取的措施的讨论中，社交媒体公司TikTok、Meta和谷歌未能消除荷兰议员们的担忧。

title: Attorney demands investigation into safety measures prior to Leiderdorp femicide
title_zh: 律师要求对莱德多普杀害女性案发生前的安全措施进行调查
description: Sébas Diekstra, the attorney for the daughters of Elvira, the 52-year-old woman from Leiderdorp who was killed in January, is calling on the Inspectorate of Justice and Security to examine the prot
description_zh: 今年1月在莱顿多普遇害的52岁女子埃尔维拉的女儿们的律师塞巴斯·迪克斯特拉呼吁司法与安全监察局对这起案件进行调查。

title: Wage gap in SME's halved in 8 years; Women in leadership still earning a lot less
title_zh: 中小企业男女工资差距8年缩小一半；但女性领导者的收入仍然远低于男性。
description: The gender wage gap in Dutch SMEs halved over the past eight years.
description_zh: 过去八年里，荷兰中小企业的性别工资差距缩小了一半。

title: PM Jetten warns Dutch military losses possible in Iran war; Said EU needs to unite
title_zh: 荷兰首相杰滕警告称，荷兰军队可能在伊朗战争中遭受损失；并表示欧盟需要团结一致。
description: Prime Minister Rob Jetten has warned that Dutch troops could be affected by the conflict with Iran, although he stressed the likelihood remains very small.
description_zh: 荷兰首相罗布·杰滕警告说，荷兰军队可能会受到与伊朗冲突的影响，但他强调这种可能性仍然很小。

title: Netherlands set to kick off Baseball World Cup against Venezuela amid roster drama
title_zh: 荷兰队将在阵容动荡中迎战委内瑞拉队，开启棒球世界杯的征程。
description: Following an intense build‑up, the Kingdom of the Netherlands baseball team kicks off its World Baseball Classic campaign at 6 p.m. against Venezuela.
description_zh: 经过紧张的赛前准备，荷兰王国棒球队将于下午 6 点对阵委内瑞拉，正式开启他们的世界棒球经典赛征程。

title: Red Light District businesses vexed by Amsterdam plan to ban tourists from coffeeshops
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹计划禁止游客进入咖啡馆，此举引发红灯区商家不满。
description: A group of business owners in Amsterdam’s Red Light District has asked the city council to abandon plans to
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹红灯区的一群商户业主已要求市议会放弃以下计划：

title: New cabinet changes direction on freelancer legislation
title_zh: 新内阁改变了自由职业者立法的方向
description: The new government is scrapping large parts of draft legislation aimed at curbing sham self-employment, following criticism from both freelancer...
description_zh: 新政府在自由职业者和其他人士的批评声中，废除了旨在遏制虚假自雇行为的大部分立法草案……

title: Dutch cheese from Beemster is voted best cheese in the world
title_zh: 来自荷兰比姆斯特的奶酪被评为世界上最好的奶酪。
description: A cheese from Noord-Holland has won the title of best cheese in the world at the annual World Championship Cheese...
description_zh: 来自荷兰北荷兰省的一款奶酪在一年一度的世界奶酪锦标赛上荣获世界最佳奶酪称号……

title: Rijkswaterstaat warns of extreme delays as multiple highways close tonight
title_zh: 荷兰公共工程和水管理部警告称，今晚多条高速公路封闭，将出现严重延误。
description: Rijkswaterstaat has warned that several highway construction projects across the Netherlands tonight may lead to major delays and heavy traffic.
description_zh: 荷兰公共工程和水资源管理部警告称，今晚荷兰各地多个高速公路建设项目可能会导致严重延误和交通拥堵。

title: Local election watch: Groningen is grappling with growth
title_zh: 地方选举观察：格罗宁根正努力应对增长
description: The Netherlands goes to the polls to vote for 342 local councils on March 18 and Dutch News is focusing...
description_zh: 荷兰将于3月18日举行地方议会选举，荷兰新闻将重点关注此次选举……

title: Garbage truck driver convicted in 2024 accident that killed U.S. music exec in Amsterdam
title_zh: 2024年，一名垃圾车司机因在阿姆斯特丹发生的事故被判有罪，该事故导致一名美国音乐高管丧生。
description: The driver of a garbage truck that caused an accident on the Passeerdersgracht in Amsterdam in October 2024, in which a 69-year-old American woman died, has been sentenced to 100 hours of community
description_zh: 2024年10月，一辆垃圾车在阿姆斯特丹的Passeerdersgracht运河上引发交通事故，导致一名69岁的美国妇女死亡。肇事司机被判处100小时社区服务。

title: Victim in Capelle aan den IJssel police shooting identified as 17-year-old
title_zh: 艾瑟尔河畔卡佩勒警方枪击案受害者确认为 17 岁
description: The individual shot bypolice on Thursday eveningin Capelle aan den IJssel has been
description_zh: 周四晚间在卡佩勒安登艾塞尔被警方击毙的那名男子已被……

title: Netherlands to work with other EU countries on deportation hubs for asylum seekers
title_zh: 荷兰将与其他欧盟国家合作，建立难民遣返中心
description: The Netherlands is joining forces with several EU member states to establish "return hubs" for rejected asylum seekers outside the European Union.
description_zh: 荷兰正与几个欧盟成员国联手，在欧盟以外建立“遣返中心”，用于安置被拒的寻求庇护者。

title: Dutch government forbids municipalities from restricting use of hazardous steel slag
title_zh: 荷兰政府禁止各市限制危险钢渣的使用
description: The national government has forbidden municipalities from restricting the use of steel slag with their own measures.
description_zh: 国家政府已禁止各市自行采取措施限制钢渣的使用。

title: Pride and traveler culture may make it to Unesco’s heritage list
title_zh: 自豪感和旅行文化或许能被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。
description: Pride Amsterdam and traveler culture (woonwagencultuur) are among five Dutch traditions that could be added to Unesco’s list of intangible...
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹骄傲节和旅行文化（woonwagencultuur）是五项可能被列入联合国教科文组织非物质文化遗产名录的荷兰传统之一……

title: 14-year-old boy arrested for groping jogging women in Dordrecht
title_zh: 一名14岁男孩因在多德雷赫特猥亵慢跑女性而被捕
description: A 14-year-old boy from Dordrecht has been arrested on suspicion of repeatedly slapping female runners on the buttocks in two neighborhoods of the city, police said.
description_zh: 警方称，一名来自多德雷赫特的 14 岁男孩因涉嫌在该市两个街区多次拍打女跑步者的臀部而被捕。

title: Young, single women gaining ground in Dutch housing market
title_zh: 年轻单身女性在荷兰房地产市场中地位日益提升
description: The number of young, single women able to buy their own homes in the Netherlands is rising.
description_zh: 在荷兰，有能力购买自己住房的年轻单身女性人数正在增加。

title: Police going too far in monitoring potential rioters, AP says
title_zh: 美联社称，警方在监控潜在暴徒方面做得太过火了
description: The Dutch data protection watchdog has warned that a police intelligence unit monitoring potential public order disturbances lacks a proper...
description_zh: 荷兰数据保护监管机构警告称，负责监控潜在公共秩序扰乱事件的警方情报部门缺乏适当的……

title: “Veggie burgers” and “vegan sausages” not off the menu after all
title_zh: “素食汉堡”和“素香肠”最终还是没有从菜单上撤下。
description: The European parliament has relaxed its proposed ban on names for meat-replacement products, allowing plant-based products to continue using “burger,”...
description_zh: 欧洲议会放宽了此前提议的对肉类替代产品名称的禁令，允许植物性产品继续使用“汉堡”等名称……

title: Dutch aid to Ukraine will not exceed €3bn, despite pledges
title_zh: 尽管荷兰做出了承诺，但其对乌克兰的援助不会超过30亿欧元。
description: Defence minister Dilan Yeşilgöz has said the government will not provide additional military support to Ukraine this year beyond the...
description_zh: 国防部长迪兰·耶希尔戈兹表示，政府今年不会向乌克兰提供额外的军事援助……

title: Women in the Netherlands still struggling with their health more than men
title_zh: 荷兰女性的健康问题仍然比男性更为严重。
description: Women in the Netherlands continue to struggle more with their health, both physical and mental, than men.
description_zh: 荷兰女性在身体和心理健康方面仍然比男性面临更多困难。

title: Pride Amsterdam, travelers' culture amog 5 nominated for UNESCO's living heritage list
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹骄傲节、旅行者文化等五项活动入围联合国教科文组织非物质文化遗产名录。
description: TheCouncil of Culturethinks that the Pride celebrations in Amsterdam and t
description_zh: 文化委员会认为阿姆斯特丹和……的骄傲节庆祝活动

title: Mild weather continues but Saharan sand is on its way
title_zh: 天气依然温和，但撒哈拉沙漠的沙尘暴即将到来。
description: The mild spring weather will continue in the coming days, although the sky will become less clear as high cloud...
description_zh: 未来几天温和的春季天气将持续，但随着高云增多，天空将变得不再那么晴朗……

title: Property developer Coen van Oostrom is new employers chief
title_zh: 房地产开发商 Coen van Oostrom 出任新任雇主负责人
description: Property developer Coen van Oostrom will become chairman of the Netherlands’ biggest employers’ organisation VNO-NCW on May 1, succeeding Ingrid...
description_zh: 房地产开发商科恩·范·奥斯特罗姆将于5月1日接替英格丽德，出任荷兰最大的雇主组织VNO-NCW的主席。

title: Councils told to stop drawing up their own rules for steel slag
title_zh: 各地方议会被告知停止自行制定钢渣管理规则
description: Local authorities must scrap their own rules for the use of steel slag, the infrastructure ministry has told councils, provinces...
description_zh: 基础设施部已告知各地方议会和省政府，地方当局必须废除其自行制定的钢渣使用规定……

title: Police in Capelle aan den IJssel shoot person seen with car involved in a robbery
title_zh: 艾瑟尔河畔卡佩勒警方开枪射击涉嫌抢劫的汽车人
description: The police shot a person in Capelle aan den IJssel on Thursday evening, the Rotterdam policereportedon X.
description_zh: 鹿特丹警方周四晚间在卡佩勒安登艾塞尔开枪击中一人，X 报道。

title: Political party membership grows, GL-PvdA will be the biggest
title_zh: 政党成员人数增长，工党联盟（GL-PvdA）将成为最大党。
description: Political party membership in the Netherlands has reached a 40-year high, with 448,100 people currently members, according to research by...
description_zh: 根据一项研究显示，荷兰政党成员人数已达到40年来的最高水平，目前共有448,100名党员。

title: Newly-built homes have many advantages for new Amsterdammers
title_zh: 新建房屋对阿姆斯特丹新居民来说有很多优势。
description: There are all sorts of advantages to buying a new-built home. After all, they are not only modern, energy efficient...
description_zh: 购买新建房屋有很多好处。毕竟，它们不仅现代、节能……

title: Over 9,000 Dutch fill out gov't contact form for people stranded in the Middle East
title_zh: 超过9000名荷兰人填写了政府联系表格，以帮助滞留在中东的人们。
description: The government’s contact form for Dutch citizens stranded in the Middle East has been completed at least 9,000 times so far.
description_zh: 荷兰政府为滞留在中东的荷兰公民设立的联系表格，目前已被填写至少 9000 次。

title: Dutch gov't hopes to avoid military conscription, but "can't rule it out"
title_zh: 荷兰政府希望避免实行兵役征召，但“不能完全排除这种可能性”。
description: The Dutch government hopes to avoid military conscription for young people, State Secretary Derk Boswijk of Defense said in a parliamentary debate about the Defense budget.
description_zh: 荷兰国防部国务秘书德克·博斯维克在议会就国防预算进行的辩论中表示，荷兰政府希望避免对年轻人实行兵役征召。

title: Explosion causes fire in Amsterdam home; Five hospitalized with smoke inhalation
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹一民宅发生爆炸起火；五人因吸入浓烟入院治疗
description: A large explosion caused a fire in a home on Herculesstraat in Amsterdam-Zuid during the early hours of Friday morning.
description_zh: 周五凌晨，阿姆斯特丹南区赫拉克勒斯街一处住宅发生剧烈爆炸并引发火灾。

title: Police receive 200 tips after hologram shown in 2009 Bilthoven rape case
title_zh: 2009年比尔特霍芬强奸案中播放全息影像后，警方收到200条线索。
description: Authorities say they have received around 200 tips since unveiling ahologram of a suspectin a 20
description_zh: 当局表示，自公布一名20世纪90年代犯罪嫌疑人的全息影像以来，他们已收到约200条线索。

title: Dutch officials propose cutting parents’ tax-free gift allowance for children
title_zh: 荷兰官员提议削减父母赠予子女的免税额度。
description: Dutch officials propose reducing the gift allowance for parents, cutting the tax-free limit on monetary gifts they make to their children, De Telegraaf
description_zh: 据《电讯报》报道，荷兰官员提议削减父母的赠与免税额度，降低他们向子女赠送现金礼物的免税限额。

title: Rotterdam The Hague Airport invests €200 million into modernising
title_zh: 鹿特丹海牙机场投资2亿欧元进行现代化改造
description: Rotterdam The Hague Airport (RTHA) is investing €200 million into renovating and modernising the airport.
description_zh: 鹿特丹海牙机场（RTHA）正在投资 2 亿欧元对机场进行翻新和现代化改造。

title: Amateur clubs push back against KNVB plans to merge Saturday and Sunday leagues
title_zh: 业余俱乐部反对荷兰足协合并周六和周日联赛的计划
description: Seven out of 10 amateur clubs feel blindsided by plans from the Royal Dutch Football Association (KNVB) to merge the Saturday and Sunday competitions in most of the higher amateur levels, research
description_zh: 一项调查显示，十分之七的业余俱乐部对荷兰皇家足球协会（KNVB）计划合并大多数高级别业余联赛的周六和周日比赛感到措手不及。

title: Dutch Council warns against limiting judges’ powers in assault cases
title_zh: 荷兰理事会警告不要限制法官在人身攻击案件中的权力
description: The Dutch Council of State has strongly criticized a government proposal that would prevent judges from issuing community service sentences for attacks on emergency workers, urging the cabinet to e
description_zh: 荷兰国务委员会强烈批评政府一项提案，该提案将阻止法官对袭击紧急救援人员者判处社区服务刑罚，并敦促内阁撤销该提案。

title: Dutch suspect denies firing gun that killed Antwerp girl, 11; Will fight extradition
title_zh: 荷兰嫌犯否认开枪射杀安特卫普11岁女孩；将抗拒引渡
description: A 25-year-old man from the Netherlands is suspected of orchestrating the deadly January 9, 2023, attack in Antwerp that killed an 11-year-old girl. Soeradj S.
description_zh: 一名来自荷兰的25岁男子涉嫌策划了2023年1月9日发生在安特卫普的致命袭击事件，该事件导致一名11岁女孩丧生。Soeradj S.

title: Amsterdam police take down site for trading in stolen data
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹警方关闭了一个交易被盗数据的网站。
description: Dutch police, working with
description_zh: 荷兰警方与

title: Low participation in colon cancer screening prompts new campaign
title_zh: 结肠癌筛查参与率低促使发起新的宣传活动
description: Men in large cities should be screened for colon cancer more often, according to the MDL Fonds.
description_zh: MDL基金会表示，大城市的男性应该更频繁地接受结肠癌筛查。

title: Dutch travelers stranded in Thailand amid Middle East airspace closures
title_zh: 中东空域关闭，荷兰旅客滞留泰国
description: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs is advising travelers stuck in Thailand amid the Middle East crisis to reach out to their airline, travel insurance provider, or travel agent for guidance.
description_zh: 外交部建议因中东危机滞留在泰国的旅客联系航空公司、旅行保险公司或旅行社寻求帮助。

title: Court cuts prison time for Utrecht woman who poisoned newborn with anti-diarrheal drugs
title_zh: 法院缩短了乌得勒支一名女子用止泻药毒害新生儿的刑期
description: The Arnhem Court of Appeal has sentenced 39-year-old Sarah V. from Utrecht to eight years in prison for repeatedly attempting to kill her newborn daughter in 2020.
description_zh: 阿纳姆上诉法院判处来自乌得勒支的 39 岁女子 Sarah V. 八年监禁，罪名是她在 2020 年多次试图杀死自己刚出生的女儿。

title: Why Rashi Agarwal says your "lazy" racism is the least interesting thing about her
title_zh: 拉希·阿加瓦尔 (Rashi Agarwal) 为什么说你“懒惰”的种族主义是她身上最不吸引人的地方
description: Stand-up comedian Rashi Agarwal does not have time for uninspired bigotry.
description_zh: 单口喜剧演员拉希·阿加瓦尔对毫无新意的偏见嗤之以鼻。

title: Local election watch: voting aids and debates in English
title_zh: 地方选举观察：英语投票辅助工具和辩论
description: Ten Dutch towns and cities will have a Kieskompas or Stemwijzer voting aid in English for the local elections on...
description_zh: 荷兰十个城镇将在地方选举中使用英文版的投票辅助工具（Kieskompas 或 Stemwijzer）。

title: State-owned NS makes a profit after five years of losses
title_zh: 国有企业NS在连续亏损五年后实现盈利。
description: Dutch rail operator NS made a profit from passenger transport for the first time since 2019 last year, helped by...
description_zh: 荷兰铁路运营商NS去年自2019年以来首次实现客运盈利，这得益于……

title: Jail agency considers tablets with softcore porn for prisoners
title_zh: 监狱管理机构考虑向囚犯配备装有软色情内容的平板电脑
description: The Dutch prisons’ agency, which oversees facilities at detention centres, is considering giving prisoners access to tablets that would include...
description_zh: 负责监管拘留中心设施的荷兰监狱管理局正在考虑向囚犯发放平板电脑，平板电脑的功能包括……

title: Court of appeal acquits far-right MP Gideon van Meijeren of incitement
title_zh: 上诉法院宣告极右翼议员吉迪恩·范·梅耶伦煽动罪名不成立
description: The Court of Appeal in The Hague has acquitted Gideon van Meijeren, a Forum voor Democratie MP, of incitement.
description_zh: 海牙上诉法院宣布民主论坛议员吉迪恩·范·梅杰伦 (Gideon van Meijeren) 煽动罪名不成立。

title: Women judges discriminated against with lower pay: Human Rights Institute
title_zh: 人权研究所：女性法官薪酬较低，遭受歧视
description: Women aspiring to be judges were discriminated against between 1994 and 2023, according to the Netherlands Institute for Human Rights.
description_zh: 根据荷兰人权研究所的数据，1994 年至 2023 年间，有志成为法官的女性受到了歧视。

title: Data of ministers, protected individuals found in massive Odido hack affecting millions
title_zh: 大规模 Odido 黑客攻击事件中泄露了部长和受保护个人的数据，影响范围达数百万人。
description: Personal data belonging to four Dutch ministers, a senior intelligence service employee, three individuals under government protection, and more than 16,000 people working in vital or strategic sec
description_zh: 涉及四位荷兰部长、一位高级情报部门雇员、三名受政府保护人员以及超过16000名在重要或战略部门工作的人员的个人数据

title: Podcast: The Liberate The Utrecht Fish Edition
title_zh: 播客：解放乌得勒支鱼版
description: As local elections approach, we talk to polling expert and political scientist Tom Louwerse about the kaleidoscopic range of candidate...
description_zh: 随着地方选举临近，我们采访了民调专家兼政治学家汤姆·卢沃斯，探讨候选人形形色色的情况……

title: NS posts first profits since 2019: €11 million profit, debt climbs to €1.2 billion
title_zh: 荷兰铁路公司自2019年以来首次实现盈利：利润1100万欧元，债务攀升至12亿欧元。
description: Dutch Railways (NS)reporteda profit for the first time since 2019, posting an underlying operati
description_zh: 荷兰铁路公司（NS）自2019年以来首次实现盈利，基本运营成本为……

title: Climate activists block access to multiple Amsterdam secondary schools
title_zh: 气候活动人士封锁了阿姆斯特丹多所中学的入口
description: Climate activists from Extinction Rebellion blocked access to multiple secondary schools in Amsterdam overnight. They glued locks closed or secured fences with chains.
description_zh: 来自“反抗灭绝”组织的环保人士连夜封锁了阿姆斯特丹的多所中学。他们用胶水封住门锁，或用铁链加固围栏。

title: JA21 submits law to keep Groningen gas fields open as "strategic reserves"
title_zh: JA21提交法案，要求将格罗宁根天然气田作为“战略储备”保留开放状态
description: JA21 wants to legally establish that the Groningen gas fields must be kept open as a “strategic reserve,” allowing for further natural gas extraction in certain situations.
description_zh: JA21 希望通过法律手段确立格罗宁根天然气田必须作为“战略储备”保持开放，允许在某些情况下进一步开采天然气。

title: Sea levels much higher than assumed, Dutch scientists discover
title_zh: 荷兰科学家发现海平面远高于预期
description: Sea levels along coasts around the world are much higher than assumed because of errors in the way they have...
description_zh: 由于测量方法上的误差，世界各地沿海地区的海平面远高于之前的估计值……

title: Police arrest Amsterdammer for “attacks to order” in Germany
title_zh: 德国警方逮捕了一名阿姆斯特丹居民，罪名是“受雇袭击”。
description: Dutch police arrested a 20-year-old man from Amsterdam on Tuesday in connection with several bomb attacks in Germany. The man...
description_zh: 荷兰警方周二逮捕了一名来自阿姆斯特丹的20岁男子，该男子涉嫌与德国发生的多起爆炸袭击有关。该男子……
